playbook.intent: PH launch noise → every comment and DM answered within 24h, lurkers converted to signups.
playbook.scope: Launch-day or post-launch maintenance: respond to every Product Hunt comment and DM within the day, convert lurkers to signups, gather objections, and turn the comment thread into long-term social proof.

success-criteria.criterion: Lurkers identified and DM'd with offer
Objection bank refreshed with at least 5 new entries

stage.name: Triage
stage.intent: All inbound sorted by intent and urgency.

tasks.task: Filter comments by question / praise / objection
Tag DMs by stage (curious / evaluating / blocking)
Pin the open question or feature ask to the top of the thread

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every comment has a tag.

stage.name: Respond
stage.intent: Personal, on-brand replies to every comment.

tasks.task: Write personal replies in batches, not template blasts
Address each objection with concrete proof or roadmap link
Escalate hot leads into DMs with offer

stage.decision-gate: Advance once 100% of comments have a response and ≥30% of replies push to signup.

stage.name: Archive
stage.intent: Comment day becomes lasting product intelligence.

tasks.task: Add lurker DMs to nurture sequence
Log new feature requests into the backlog

stage.decision-gate: Done once objections and backlog are committed.

extra.value: [Acquiring new comments via aggressive promotion — engage existing ones, Multi-platform comment work — Product Hunt only, 'Negative-comment fights — defuse, not escalate']
[An active Product Hunt page, Calendar block of at least 4 focused hours on launch day]
[Treating the playbook as a checklist instead of a decision tree, Skipping decision gates when intermediate progress feels good, Letting tools or platforms replace the founder's own judgement]

['Did each stage produce its named output or get explicitly skipped with a note?', 'Were decision gates respected or quietly bypassed?', 'Is the evidence trail strong enough to defend the verdict externally?']

{human: faion get-content product-hunt-comment-back-day --format md, agent: faion get-content product-hunt-comment-back-day --format context, json: faion get-content product-hunt-comment-back-day --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft from brainstorm-2026-05-17, persona P2 (indie hacker)'}]
